title: Super Metroid
prompt:
Original illustration inspired by a retro Action-Adventure game.

A lone armored explorer in a futuristic industrial skyline or reactor zone with cold light and scale, standing in a hostile alien cavern under atmospheric light.

Game metadata:
- Title: Super Metroid
- Platform: Super Nintendo
- Release year: 1994
- Secondary genre signal: Fantasy

Visual focus:
- one clear subject
- strong silhouette
- readable in 1 second

Style:
- colorful 16-bit-inspired fantasy illustration, richer gradients, polished sprite-era composition
- pixel art or stylized rendering depending on platform
- clean and modern interpretation of retro limitations
- limited color palette when relevant

Mood:
- futuristic, urgent, cold, focused

Composition:
- one subject slightly left of center, with a clean silhouette and a world behind it that explains the genre immediately
- simple background
- no clutter

Important:
- Do NOT replicate any official character, logo, or design
- Do NOT imitate exact game assets
- Must feel original but clearly inspired by the game's genre and atmosphere

Output:
- high clarity
- strong contrast
- minimal noise
- no text
- no watermark

Adjustment: enlarge the central subject, reduce clutter, strengthen contrast, and keep the background supportive but secondary.
negative_prompt: avoid resemblance to metroid, no official character likeness, no copyrighted costume replication, no original enemy designs, no game logo, no UI elements, no screenshot recreation, no exact box art composition, no branded symbols, no text, no abstract shapes, no decorative geometry, no empty background, simplify background detail, no humanoid face, no mascot proportions
